headline: Wall Street Technician Declares Financials, Industrials, and Biotech Poised for Breakouts. 3 ETFs Could Soar.
summary: Markets are hunting for new leadership as the Big Tech engine sputters, and one Wall Street technician thinks she knows where the baton is being passed. On CNBC’s Closing Bell Overtime, Fairlead Strategies founder Katie Stockton argued that financials, industrials, and biotech look ready to take over leadership as semiconductor and memory names show their ... headline: Cloud Infrastructure Rotation Intensifies as AMD Surges While Microsoft Stumbles
summary: AI compute demand is driving a market rotation from cloud platforms to semiconductor stocks. AMD leads with 20% monthly gains, while Broadcom and NVIDIA show strong fundamentals. Microsoft lags as capital flows to pure-play AI infrastructure beneficiaries.
